# Jeremy Dubs — Cascade Creatives

## About
Jeremy Dubs operates Cascade Creatives — an AI-native creative studio specializing in web design, content production, and digital strategy. Based in Bellingham, WA, working with clients everywhere.

## Services
- **Web Design & Development**: Custom websites on Astro, static HTML, and Webflow. New builds, redesigns, and performance optimization.
- **Content Production**: Video, photography, drone (FAA Part 107). Produced for websites, social media, and paid ads.
- **AI & Digital Strategy**: AI workflow integration, content automation, digital presence consulting.

## Key Clients
- Paradise Finance (website design)
- All Star Lake Spa (website redesign)
- Cascade Pest Control (ongoing video production)
- NW Montessori School (anniversary film)
- Marcel Dolak, Engel & Völkers (luxury real estate video)
